name: Notion
description: Adds Notion workspace search, read, data source query, page creation/update, and comment tools for approved threads.

env.description: Fallback Notion API key used when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Notion API key
settings.description: Notion integration secret used for API requests. Falls back to NOTION_API_KEY.

access.name: Notion - Read
access.description: Expose Notion search, fetch, and data source query tools to selected threads.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search Notion pages, databases, and data sources by title/content. Parameters: query string; optional filter.object page, database, or data_source; optional page_size and start_cursor.

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Search Notion, embed returned object summaries, and rank cached results semantically. Requires a configured embedding model.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a Notion page, database, data source, or block by URL or ID. Parameters: target string; optional format summary, markdown, page, blocks, or schema; optional include_children, depth, page_size, and start_cursor.

tools.name: query_data_source
tools.description: Query a Notion data source with optional filter, sorts, filter_properties, page_size, and start_cursor.

access.name: Notion - Write
access.description: Expose Notion page creation, page update, and comment tools to selected threads.

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a Notion page under a page, data source, or workspace with optional title, properties, markdown, children, template_id, icon, and cover.

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update Notion page properties/icon/cover/trash state and optionally append or replace markdown/blocks using the 2026 position object for block insertion.

tools.name: comment
tools.description: List or create Notion comments. List requires action=list and block_id. Create requires action=create, parent, and rich_text.
